zh.Cathedral, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Strathbogie於1362年3月1日出生在英國諾圖波藍德米特福德時，她的父親David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl30歲，母親Elizabeth de Ferrers27歲。她於1376年與Sir Thomas Percy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1416年9月10日在英國越可爾武普薩爾享年54歲。

zh-hans.Cathedral, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾
zh-hans.Groby, Leicestershire, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比
zh-hans.Mitford & Felton, Northumberland, Englan: 英国諾圖波藍德米特福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Strathbogie于1362年3月1日出生在英国諾圖波藍德米特福德时，她的父亲David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl30岁，母亲Elizabeth de Ferrers27岁。她于1376年与Sir Thomas Percy结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1416年9月10日在英国越可爾武普薩爾享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Strathbogie was born on 1 March 1362, in Mitford, Northumberland, England, her father, David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth de Ferrers, was 27. She married Sir Thomas Percy in 1376. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 10 September 1416, in Upsall, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Strathbogie est née le 1 mars 1362, à Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Ferrers, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Percy en 1376. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1416, à Upsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Strathbogie am 1. März 1362 in Mitford, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Ferrers 27. Sie hat 1376 Sir Thomas Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 10. September 1416 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Upsall, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Strathbogie è nata il il 1 marzo 1362 nel Mitford, Northumberland, England, sua padre, David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Ferrers, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Percy nel 1376. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 10 settembre 1416, nel Upsall, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Strathbogieが1362年3月1日にイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードで生まれた時，父David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Athollは30歳，母Elizabeth de Ferrersは27歳であった。1376年にSir Thomas Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1416年9月10日にイギリスヨークシュアイアウプサルで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Strathbogie(이)가 1362년 3월 1일 영국 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Ferrers(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1376년 Sir Thomas Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1416년 9월 10일 영국 요르크실르 업사에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.1 March 1362–10 September 1416: 1362 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 1–1416 оны Есдүгээр сарын 10

pt.1 March 1362–10 September 1416: 1 de março de 1362–10 de setembro de 1416
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Strathbogie nasceu em 1 de março de 1362, em Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Ferrers, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Percy em 1376. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1416, em Upsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Strathbogie родилась 1 марта 1362 г. в местности митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Ferrers, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Percy в 1376 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 10 сентября 1416 г. в местности упсалл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.1 March 1362–10 September 1416: 1 de marzo de 1362–10 de septiembre de 1416
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Strathbogie nació el 1 de marzo de 1362, en Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Ferrers, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Percy en 1376. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1416, en Upsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
